race.comment: BLAZING GURU (2) fourth-up for this and undefeated in one attempt at this trip. Indicated a win was imminent when he closed late with the 60.5kg for a tough sixth over 1850m at Mudgee. Kept fresh and Wadick sticks. Ready to go on with it here. ARE YOU KIDDING (1) lightly raced gelding heading in the right direction. Shouldered the 61kg with a game on-pace third over 1600m at Scone. Kept up to the mark with a 1000m tick over trial placing at Scone, expected to get the trip. DEVILS DAUGHTER (3) tough staying mare ready to peak with the 3kg claim. Value contender. Blinkers go on KEINBAH'S WARRIOR (6). Include.
